description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight, sturdy legs positioned at each corner. The wood grain is visible across the entire surface, giving it a natural and elegant appearance. The table has a medium-brown finish, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic. The legs are thick and robust, providing stable support for the tabletop. The edges of the table are straight and clean, with a slight bevel for comfort and style. This table is suitable for communal or work-related activities in urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A rectangular, medium-brown wooden table with a smooth surface and four sturdy legs, featuring a minimalist, modern design. The visible wood grain and clean lines make it suitable for urban public or communal spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow edge of the tabletop and two front legs, highlighting the table's thickness and wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop and all four legs, emphasizing the table's rectangular proportions and sturdy construction.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite narrow edge and two rear legs, with visible wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full tabletop length and all four legs from the other side.
